caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a dark wooden podium against a textured, green marble-like wall with recessed geometric patterns. He is wearing a light-colored, long-sleeved kurta paired with a matching sleeveless Nehru jacket. Two microphones are mounted on the podium, positioned in front of him. To his side, a tall, thin glass column containing pink flowers is visible. Across the sequence, he is speaking and using hand gestures to emphasize his points. Initially, he holds both hands up with palms facing inward. He then extends his left arm and points his index finger outward. Later, he points with his right index finger toward the side, and finally, he raises his left hand again with the palm open and fingers spread. His facial expression remains active and engaged as he speaks throughout the clip.
